title: helichrysum benoistii
intro: Helichrysum benoistii, also known as the Madagascar everlasting, is a plant species of the Helichrysum genus, native to Madagascar and known for its fragrant yellow flowers. The plant's essential oil has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum benoistii have been used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, resulting in improved overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant include essential oil, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
